components.value: V, S, M (a shard of glass)

area.value: weapon or ammunition touched; see text

description.value: You render a target weapon or up to 50 pieces of ammunition invisible, granting the wielder a +20 bonus on Sleight of Hand checks made to conceal the weapon or ammunition and a +5 circumstance bonus on Bluff checks to feint with the weapon or ammunition.
